# Testing matrix multiplication edge cases and random tests

# Write 0, compute 0 * 0 = 0

WRITE8 0 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 1 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 2 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 3 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 4 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 5 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 6 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]
WRITE8 7 [0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0]

LC 0
CR 1 0 2
READM32 1

# Compute I * 0 = 0
CR 1 4 2
READM32 1

# Write A, compute A * 0 = 0

WRITE8 0  [1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8]
WRITE8 1  [9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16]
WRITE8 2  [17, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24]
WRITE8 3  [25, 26, 27, 28, 29, 30, 31, 32]
WRITE8 4  [33, 34, 35, 36, 37, 38, 39, 40]
WRITE8 5  [41, 42, 43, 44, 45, 46, 47, 48]
WRITE8 6  [49, 50, 51, 52, 53, 54, 55, 56]
WRITE8 7  [57, 58, 59, 60, 61, 62, 63, 64]

CR 1 0 2
READM32 1

# Write C, compute A * 0 + C = C

WRITE32 0 [0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13]
WRITE32 1 [21, 34, 55, 89, 144, 233, 377, 610]
WRITE32 2 [987, 1597, 2584, 4181, 6765, 10946, 17711, 28657]
WRITE32 3 [46368, 75025, 121393, 196418, 317811, 514229, 832040, 1346269]
WRITE32 4 [0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13]
WRITE32 5 [21, 34, 55, 89, 144, 233, 377, 610]
WRITE32 6 [987, 1597, 2584, 4181, 6765, 10946, 17711, 28657]
WRITE32 7 [46368, 75025, 121393, 196418, 317811, 514229, 832040, 1346269]

WRITE8 8  [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 9  [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 10 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 11 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 12 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 13 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 14 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]
WRITE8 15 [127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127, 127]

LRCR 1 0 0 1
READM32 1

# Compute A_max * B_max + C_max = MAX (note, accumulate is overwritten by result)

WRITE32 8  [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 9  [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 10 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 11 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 12 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 13 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 14 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]
WRITE32 15 [2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000, 2147470000]

CC 1 1 1
READM32 1

# Compute A_max_neg * B_max - C_max = MAX_NEG (note, accumulate is overwritten by result)

WRITE8 16 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 17 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 18 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 19 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 20 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 21 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 22 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]
WRITE8 23 [-128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128, -128]

WRITE32 8  [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 9  [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 10 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 11 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 12 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 13 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 14 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]
WRITE32 15 [-2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000, -2147470000]

LRCC 1 2 1 0
READM32 1

# Compute A * B + C (note, accumulate is overwritten by result)
CR 0 0 0
READM32 0

# Load A, Load B, Load C, compute A * B + C (all random)

WRITE8 0 [99, -34, -108, -80, 32, 60, 122, 19]
WRITE8 1 [-77, -86, 84, -72, -49, -70, 26, 61]
WRITE8 2 [25, 54, 50, 66, -29, -10, 51, 32]
WRITE8 3 [93, -103, 117, 1, 54, 83, 4, -54]
WRITE8 4 [-10, 103, -33, 108, 16, 106, 8, -10]
WRITE8 5 [-71, 56, -108, 7, -77, 12, -95, 40]
WRITE8 6 [-23, 0, 69, -57, 45, -65, -13, -27]
WRITE8 7 [52, -9, 93, -59, -79, -65, -100, -20]

WRITE8 8 [-113, 63, -54, 96, -108, -89, 48, -74]
WRITE8 9 [-43, 108, -35, -98, 60, 67, -121, -7]
WRITE8 10 [81, -66, 99, -89, 26, 122, 29, -9]
WRITE8 11 [44, -46, 18, 4, 34, -8, 91, -73]
WRITE8 12 [-101, -46, 82, -125, -33, -30, 38, -125]
WRITE8 13 [-68, -102, -25, 31, 64, 88, -98, 55]
WRITE8 14 [-61, 110, 64, -103, -80, -6, -23, 92]
WRITE8 15 [115, -11, -124, 30, 22, -51, -61, -18]

WRITE32 0 [1906039880, -1294078670, -104540819, 1755856170, 76840551, -1326864146, -433331889, -1030540331]
WRITE32 1 [842650909, -809944120, 304952898, -1696880831, -1877277853, -317969120, -1573138746, -1867370721]
WRITE32 2 [2024817096, -1413621199, -1752308152, -678483176, -1453364263, -2080356960, -1261626396, 634775254]
WRITE32 3 [-750098978, -578337390, -320766149, 1670702042, -950197373, 911634331, 1310237150, 1401627786]
WRITE32 4 [-340445697, -317602231, 799943224, 1473678361, 1759221691, 561662828, -1026105495, -1197732966]
WRITE32 5 [367919796, -802892472, 768869943, -67730807, 2023715610, -39463630, -1221142543, -1321087078]
WRITE32 6 [-1731595474, 1557516857, 639185468, -2086145159, 1046312187, -1942818419, 1092142395, -1196698882]
WRITE32 7 [1175340704, 447380844, -1869623173, -1815681976, -1518565232, 1939742372, 1689701687, -1133824734]

LR 1
CR 1 0 0
READM32 1

# Load A, Load B, Load C, compute A * B + C (all random)

WRITE8 16 [-13, -109, -36, -35, -23, 75, 118, -12]
WRITE8 17 [111, 114, -48, 34, 24, 44, -9, 87]
WRITE8 18 [-41, -105, -95, -60, -83, 29, -9, 12]
WRITE8 19 [-55, 92, -45, 26, -92, 86, -74, 73]
WRITE8 20 [13, 100, 29, 39, -53, 92, 107, 35]
WRITE8 21 [-51, -10, -93, -75, 79, -68, -49, 27]
WRITE8 22 [53, 85, 54, 41, -85, -51, 80, 53]
WRITE8 23 [-103, 61, -10, -12, -89, -68, -122, -86]

WRITE8 24 [-119, -9, 112, 34, -76, -55, 84, -42]
WRITE8 25 [108, 88, 96, -45, -61, -25, -67, -14]
WRITE8 26 [-117, -23, 72, -25, -77, -79, -78, -101]
WRITE8 27 [-101, -123, 71, 92, 66, -37, -11, -26]
WRITE8 28 [-114, 81, 51, -41, 26, 84, 68, -69]
WRITE8 29 [-36, 53, 66, 47, 77, -116, -70, 46]
WRITE8 30 [0, 117, 25, -93, 37, -64, -105, 51]
WRITE8 31 [2, -5, -101, -81, -29, -36, -42, 78]

WRITE32 0 [-414899475, 1478206584, -1731780381, -2058374968, 464419244, 1469562934, -1262059370, -473203815]
WRITE32 1 [1934818167, -1537189292, -77940516, 438831378, -509337547, 602048661, 1878974428, 1021063447]
WRITE32 2 [403940573, 657880447, 1967862938, -817959662, 237033179, 1471595085, -528063547, -1582874228]

LR 3

READM32 1
